workflows.name: Onboarding Automation
workflows.description: Fires on payment confirmation — creates ClickUp project, sends welcome email, writes Airtable record

workflows.name: Lead Generation
workflows.description: Daily Hunter.io + Tavily search → ICP-matched prospects written to Airtable

workflows.name: Outreach Agent
workflows.description: Personalised cold email sequences queued in Instantly.ai from Airtable prospects

workflows.name: Status Update Agent
workflows.description: Weekly project status emails to active clients from ClickUp data

workflows.name: Referral Trigger Agent
workflows.description: Automated referral request 30 days post-launch, queued in Instantly.ai

workflows.name: ClickUp Sync
workflows.description: Syncs Airtable project_status to ClickUp task statuses every 2 hours

workflows.name: Reporting Agent
workflows.description: Monthly performance reports for retainer clients — auto-generated and emailed

workflows.name: Typeform Lead Qualification
workflows.description: Scores inbound Typeform leads via Claude, emails Kai if Grade A/B

workflows.name: Credential Follow-Up
workflows.description: Daily check for stalled onboarding clients — alerts Kai if credentials not submitted >48h

workflows.name: Credential Detector
workflows.description: Every 2h — detects when n8n_api_key is populated and auto-sets project_status to build.ready

workflows.name: Website Chatbot
workflows.description: Stateless 3-question lead scoring chatbot on phoenixautomation.ai — hot leads booked to Calendly

workflows.name: Scoping Agent
workflows.description: Polls call_complete clients → Claude generates scope → emails Kai with Approve button

workflows.name: Scope Approval
workflows.description: GET /approve-scope — locks scope, generates proposal draft, emails Kai

workflows.name: Workflow Builder Agent
workflows.description: Polls build.ready clients → generates n8n workflow JSON → deploys to client n8n → sets build_review
